channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: College football turns upside down, but this final four is a collection of the sport's big programs
item.description: In the first round of the College Football Playoff, the teams seeded 5-8 all won. In the second round, they all won again.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jets interview former Titans coach Mike Vrabel for their head coaching job
item.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J. (AP) — The New York Jets interviewed former Tennessee Titans coach Mike Vrabel on Friday for their head coaching vacancy. Vrabel is the second known coaching candidate to meet with the Jets, who announced they completed their interview with him.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Freeman and Notre Dame handle 'tough moments' and oust Georgia from CFP with 23-10 win in Sugar Bowl
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Notre Dame coach Marcus Freeman and the Fighting Irish found the right balance of family and football to produce a memorable performance under unprecedented, emotionally trying circumstances.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears CB Jaylon Johnson earns team's lone Pro Bowl selection this season, his 2nd straight
item.description: Bears cornerback Jaylon Johnson has been selected to represent the NFC at the 2025 Pro Bowl Games, the NFL announced Thursday morning. The games will be held a week before the Super Bowl, on Sunday, Feb. 2, at Camping World Stadium in Orlando, Fla.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: With chance for 3rd straight win, Bulls fall on road to woeful Wizards, 125-107
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After winning two games in a row to close out 2024, the Bulls seemingly had a great opportunity to kick off 2025 with a third straight victory when they visited the nation's capital on Wednesday night to face the woeful Wizards. Things certainly didn't go as planned for Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: No. 6 Ohio State routs top-ranked Oregon 41-21 in the Rose Bowl, advances to CFP semifinals
item.description: PASADENA, Calif. (AP) — Second chances don’t come around often in life, Ohio State coach Ryan Day told his players in a team meeting before the Rose Bowl.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Pistons guard Jaden Ivey sustains leg injury in victory over the Magic
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Detroit guard Jaden Ivey sustained what appeared to be a severe injury to his lower left leg in the fourth quarter of Detroit's victory over the Orlando Magic on Wednesday night. Orlando's Cole Anthony slipped and fell as he and Ivey went for the ball.
item.dc:creator: DAVE HOGG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox trade for left-handed reliever from Phillies
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox traded for a left-handed reliever from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for a minor league prospect. In exchange for minor-league right-hander Aaron Combs, the White Sox acquired 31-year-old left-handed pitcher Tyler Gilbert from the Phillies.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jimmy Garoppolo to make debut for playoff-bound Rams in place of Matthew Stafford against Seahawks
item.description: Jimmy Garoppolo will take his first snaps for the Rams when he starts in place of Matthew Stafford in playoff-bound Los Angeles' regular-season finale against Seattle on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James' youngest son Bryce commits to Arizona
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (AP) — Bryce James, son of NBA star LeBron James, is heading to Arizona. Bryce James announced his decision Wednesday on Instagram and his father had a quick response. “CONGRATULATIONS MAXIMUS!!,” LeBron James posted.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Sugar Bowl postponed to Thursday night
item.description: Hours following the New Year's Day tragedy on Bourbon Street, Wednesday's Allstate Sugar Bowl bout between Notre Dame and Georgia is being postponed.
item.dc:creator: Richie Mills, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lenny Randle, major leaguer repeatedly in the spotlight for 12 seasons, dies at 75
item.description: MURRIETA, Calif. (AP) — Lenny Randle, a big league player for 12 seasons who spoke five languages, performed stand-up comedy, was dubbed “The Most Interesting Man in Baseball” and was suspended for punching his Texas Rangers manager, has died. He was 75.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utes blown out in Big 12 opener by Baylor, 81-56
item.description: WACO, Tex. (AP) - It was a rude awakening to the Big 12 Conference for the Runnin' Utes. V.J. Edgecombe scored 19 points, three other Baylor players had 15 and the 25th-ranked Bears led throughout in an 81-56 win over Utah on Tuesday in the Big 12 opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Holiday Classic: Lincoln Stockton 64, Mission Bay 45
item.description: In the American Bracket Championship Game of the 2024 Holiday Classic, Lincoln High School from Stockton, CA defeated Mission Bay 64-45.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: How the Chicago Blackhawks brought the St. Louis Blues to life
item.description: As the St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks gear up for the 2025 NHL Winter Classic, it's worth revisiting a fascinating piece of hockey history: The Blues franchise, as St. Louis knows it today, might not exist without a helping hand from their cross-state rival.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Coby White, Torrey Craig lead the Bulls past the Hornets in overtime, 115-108
item.description: Coby White narrowly missed his first career triple-double, finishing with 23 points, 10 rebounds and nine assists, and Torrey Craig scored 18 with five 3-pointers after halftime as the Chicago Bulls held on to beat the Charlotte Hornets 115-108 in overtime Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Darnold gives Vikings another gem with career-high 377 yards in 27-25 win over Packers
item.description: The Minnesota Vikings were ready to start their postgame ritual in honor of a ninth consecutive victory before realizing Sam Darnold was still missing from the raucous locker room because he was finishing his interview with the TV broadcasting crew.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mayfield throws 5 TD passes and Bucs keep playoff, NFC South hopes alive with 48-14 rout of Panthers
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The Tampa Bay Buccaneers played like a team determined to do whatever's necessary to make the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Report: Cubs deal former 1B prospect Matt Mervis to Marlins for utilityman
item.description: The Cubs have traded one former infield prospect for another. ESPN's Jeff Passan reported on his X feed early Sunday afternoon that the Cubs have dealt first baseman Matt Mervis to the Miami Marlins for utilityman Vidal Bruján, according to sources.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: USU beats San Diego State on last-second shot, 67-66
item.description: SAN DIEGO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State men’s basketball earned its first road win over a ranked opponent in over three decades Saturday afternoon in front of a sellout crowd at Viejas Arena, taking down No. 20 San Diego State 67-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Colorado football fans face a dramatic week across three teams
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado football fans experienced a week filled with high-stakes action, featuring the Denver Broncos chasing a playoff berth and the Colorado Buffaloes and Colorado State Rams battling in bowl games.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5
